description_long: This street light features a classic lantern-style lamp head with a four-sided, slightly tapered glass enclosure and a decorative, multi-tiered cap topped with a finial. The lamp head is supported by a slender, cylindrical pole that includes ornamental bands and a subtly flared base. The structure is predominantly a dark bronze or brown color, with the glass panels providing a translucent, frosted appearance. The overall design evokes a vintage or Victorian aesthetic, suitable for traditional urban or park settings. The lamp is ground-mounted, with no visible arms or branching elements. Its robust construction suggests durability and resistance to outdoor elements.
description: A vintage-style street light with a lantern-shaped glass lamp head, ornate cap, and a slender, dark bronze pole with decorative bands and a flared base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical lantern head, ornate cap, and the full length of the slender pole with its decorative base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the same lantern head and pole, with the profile of the cap and base visible, maintaining symmetry.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the lantern head, cap, and pole details clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the lantern head and pole profile with consistent decorative features.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic lantern-style with a four-sided, slightly tapered glass enclosure, multi-tiered decorative cap, and a pointed finial; glass appears frosted or translucent.
attribute_pole_ornamentation: Decorative bands and a subtly flared base.
